overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a dark cyberpunk black market corridor with neon-lit vendor stalls. The player walks through a metal-grated walkway, examines an electronics shop selling cyberdecks, and enters a butcher shop with hanging synthetic meat products.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with metal walkways

events.description: approaching the DECKS electronics vendor stall with green neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark metal corridor toward a neon-lit electronics stall

notable_agents.action: two people standing by a window looking out at the city lights

entered.detail: metal grid walkway with neon light reflections
vertical red neon light strip illuminating the corridor
large window showing night city lights outside
green neon sign for the electronics vendor visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dark industrial corridor with metal grating floors and red neon lighting. Two NPCs stand by a window looking out at the night city as the camera approaches a green neon sign for a cyberdeck vendor.

scene_state.functional_zone: electronics vendor stall selling cyberdecks and chips

events.description: enters the DECKS electronics shop and approaches the counter
stops walking to examine merchandise displayed on the counter

agents.ego_description: examining various electronic components and chips displayed on the vendor's counter

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the counter wearing a cap and green vest

entered.detail: large green neon sign reading DECKS above the stall
L-shaped counter covered with electronic merchandise
yellow neon sign reading FIXER on the back wall
stacked boxes on the left side of the counter
various electronic chips and components laid out on display

segments.scene_description: The player enters the DECKS electronics shop, approaching a counter covered with cybernetic components and chips. A vendor stands behind the counter as the camera pans across the merchandise, with a yellow FIXER neon sign visible on the back wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: market corridor transitioning to butcher shop entrance

events.description: exits DECKS shop back into the main market corridor
enters the BUTCHER shop with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking from the electronics vendor through the corridor and entering the butcher shop

notable_agents.action: person in purple outfit standing near the BUTCHER entrance

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading BUTCHER above the shop entrance
glass window showing meat hanging inside the shop
white tiled floor inside the butcher shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The player exits the electronics shop and walks through the corridor toward a red neon BUTCHER sign. After passing an NPC in purple clothing, the camera enters the butcher shop, transitioning from metal grating to white tiled floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: cybernetic meat shop interior with refrigerated lockers

events.description: interior shifts from warm neon to cooler blue-white fluorescent lighting
pans right to examine the hanging meat lockers and products
exits the butcher shop back to the market corridor

agents.ego_description: examining the synthetic meat products and cybernetic vendor inside the butcher shop

notable_agents.action: vendor with cybernetic arm leaning on the white counter
customer examining hanging meat products in the lockers

entered.detail: white tiled counter with packaged meat products displayed
refrigerated lockers with hanging meat carcasses
large industrial ventilation fans on the back wall
large pieces of synthetic meat hanging from hooks

segments.scene_description: Inside the butcher shop, the lighting shifts to cool fluorescent blue. The player examines a counter with packaged meat and a vendor with a cybernetic arm, then pans to show refrigerated lockers filled with hanging meat carcasses while another customer browses. The segment ends as the player exits back to the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark industrial black market that transitions from neon-lit corridors into specialized vendor stalls. It begins on a metal-grated walkway bathed in red neon light, passing NPCs gazing at the city skyline before approaching a green neon sign. As the camera enters the DECKS electronics shop, the environment shifts to a cluttered interior filled with cybernetic components and a yellow FIXER sign, before the view pivots back into the corridor toward a red BUTCHER sign. The scene then transitions from the metal grating to white tiled floors as the camera enters the butcher shop, where the lighting shifts to a cool fluorescent blue. Finally, the camera pans across packaged meats and refrigerated lockers filled with hanging carcasses before turning back toward the exit of the corridor.
